allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; comments=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'--- {c[\\"user\\"][\\"login\\"]} ---\\n{c[\\"body\\"]}\\n'\) for c in comments]")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const comments=JSON.parse\(d\); comments.forEach\(c=>console.log\('--- '+c.user.login+' ---\\n'+c.body+'\\n'\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const items=JSON.parse\(d\); items.forEach\(i=>console.log\('Discussion #'+i.number+': '+i.title+' \('+i.comments+' comments\)'\)\);}\);")
